planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 tests terminal stand IDQP/MPC assist after exp112 made deep no-fall contact/slip but failed return/pose gates.

perspectives.product: directly attacks the return-to-stand blocker in the latest best no-fall crouch branch
perspectives.architecture: wraps exp112 primitive MPC with terminal stand qfrc, stance anchoring, and base recovery proxy
perspectives.qa: native exp29 visible gate, raw JSON per variant, browser replay flag explicit
perspectives.skeptic: base qfrc is a simulator-side assist and not a deployable actuator proof

dod: state whether any variant passes exp29 visible gate and whether browser replay was attempted
